title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Completed provider failure semantics prerequisite check. Existing implementation already maps unexpected provider exceptions to ProviderError exit 5, provider validation to exit 6, and records ingest_failed before artifacts. Added CLI regression tests proving provider failure and provider validation return exit 5/6, emit JSON errors, write ingest_failed ledger records, and leave source/artifacts/archive untouched.
next_actions: Implement session provider path: shared ProviderResponse JSON parser, privacy.allow_session_provider, provider request/response envelope helpers, two-phase CLI, persisted-request identity verification, and stale response/no-op tests.
continuation_hint: Next: Implement session provider path: shared ProviderResponse JSON parser, privacy.allow_session_provider, provider request/response envelope helpers, two-phase CLI, persisted-request identity verification, and stale response/no-op tests.
